assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud describe command for versions, kubectl get nodes for health, and kubectl get pods for status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 provides the exact gcloud container get-server-config command with --format parameter to check 1.33 availability in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 includes kubectl get --raw /metrics command to check deprecated APIs and gcloud recommender insights command for additional checks

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 3.1 provides the exact gcloud container clusters upgrade command with --master and --cluster-version 1.33 flags

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 3.3 includes verification commands (kubectl get pods -n kube-system, kubectl get nodes) with expected outputs specified

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 4.1 and 4.4 provide exact gcloud container node-pools upgrade commands for both node pools, though uses single-level upgrade (1.32→1.33) rather than skip-level

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Section 4.2 provides kubectl get nodes commands with specific filters and gcloud container operations list to monitor upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Only provides single-level upgrade (1.32→1.33) without any mention of skip-level options for node pools, though this may be acceptable given the single version jump

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 5 includes comprehensive validation with gcloud describe for versions, kubectl get pods for health, and specific kube-system checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes Emergency Rollback section with specific commands for creating new node pools at old version and migration steps
